creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
So can this one now be closed?

For future reference, all bug followups should be Cc:ed to bug-followup@,
not freebsd-ports-bugs@ or freebsd-bugs@.  Without the bug-followup@ Cc:,
your later posts will not make it into GNATS.  The right list will
automatically be Cc:ed via GNATS.
